ai_analysis.one_sentence_summary: productcatalogservice only needs catalog data, not a default API credential—drop automount to shrink what a compromised Go binary can steal beyond its own ConfigMaps.
ai_analysis.true_positive_rationale: Violations explicitly describe automounted default tokens on a deployment that should be a plain data service.
ai_analysis.attack_vector: An exploited catalog pod could use the token to read namespaced objects the default SA can list/watch.
ai_analysis.blast_radius: Read-heavy catalog tier; impact scales with how permissive default SA is inside ms-demo.
ai_analysis.prioritization_rationale: Standard MEDIUM posture issue unless threat modeling shows sensitive catalog configuration in etcd-accessible objects.
recommended_actions: Set automountServiceAccountToken false and redeploy productcatalogservice.
Mirror the manifest change in shared bases so future demos inherit the secure default.
Re-scan to ensure related duplicate alerts collapse after rollout.
mitigation_strategies: Pre-merge CI check that fails when new Deployments omit explicit automount settings in prod namespaces.
